title: Determination of an efficient and reliable method for PCR detection of borrelial DNA from engorged ticks
author: Ušanović, Lejla
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Figure 1. Different amount of starting material – A. The whole individual of partially engorged tick; B. Anterior half of fully-engorged tick (above red line); C. Paired DNA extraction – mouthparts (1) and a part of scutum (2).
